posts.author: bennyarts (Benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I really miss the ability to grant a specific group of people permission to edit columns that are restricted for guests, without having to give them board owner status. It would be much more convenient to assign editing capabilities to a group instead of to each person individually.

What are you trying to achieve

Being able to create groups inside a workspace so you can give editing capabilities to a group of people instead individuals.
